concept: I Came, I Saw, I Forgot Why I Walked Into This Room
title: Funny Midlife Memory Humor - I Came, I Saw, I Forgot Why T-Shirt
description:
Ever feel like you’re starring in your own sitcom, where every episode revolves around you walking into a room and immediately forgetting why? Relatable, right? This witty design captures the ultimate midlife brain glitch in bold, unapologetic style. It's the perfect comedic armor for anyone navigating the chaos of aging with grace, humor, and a slightly scrambled to-do list. 

**Perfect for:**
- Anyone who doesn’t need a calendar to tell them they’re “of a certain age.”
- Friends who laugh at the fact they just misplaced their phone...while holding it.
- Parents, grandparents, and anyone who’s ever muttered, “Wait, what was I doing again?”

**DETAILS:**
- Available in a full range of light and dark colors.
- Bold, attention-grabbing typography that reads: 'I CAME, I SAW, I FORGOT WHY I WALKED INTO THIS ROOM.'
- Crisp, made-to-order design with clean minimalist humor that suits any outfit or mood.

100% Airlume combed and ring-spun cotton (Bella Canvas 3001) — lightweight 4.2 oz/yd² (142 g/m²) for breathability
Retail crew neckline with ribbed knit collar and shoulder tape for shape retention
Side seams and tear-away label for fit stability and comfort
Vibrant, crisp printing: DTF or DTG depending on provider for detailed sleeve/label prints
Ethically sourced/REACH certified; blank product sourced from Honduras; multiple fabric blends for heathered colors

Machine wash: cold (max 30C or 90F)
Non-chlorine: bleach as needed
Tumble dry: low heat
Iron, steam or dry: medium heat
Do not dryclean

Shipped by BanterWearCo. Questions? Message me — I respond faster than a teenager asked to take out the trash. (Low bar, admittedly.)
